title: isodon gibbosus
intro: Isodon gibbosus, also known as Kansui or Pseudobulbus, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to dispel dampness, relieve swelling, and reduce fever. The health benefits of Isodon gibbosus include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional Chinese medicine to relieve digestive issues and promote sweating. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically dried and processed into a decoction or powder, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
